name: AI Use Disclosed
description: Clients are informed when an AI system is generating client-facing responses or analysis.
rationale: IOSCO Table 5.1: 'How does the firm ensure clients know when AI is generating responses or analysis?' Hidden AI use in investor-facing services is a disclosure failure.

examples.fails: a client-facing AI response with no disclosure that AI was used

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
